entries.content: conjunction 因为 yīnwèi▸ they must be at home, because the light's on 他们一定在家，因为灯亮着▸ don't do it just because you can 不要仅仅因为你能做就去做
entries.label: A
entries.name: conjunction

entries.content: because of preposition phrase 因为 yīnwèi▸ because of the rain 因为下雨▸ we're late, and it's all because of you! 我们迟到了，都是因为你！
entries.label: B
entries.name: because of
